Contact me!

Ideas | Inquiries | Proposals | Consulations

Over the years I’ve worked on different projects covering different machine learning fields. Obviously the field has exploded there have been every year so many new developments that it feels it’s really hard to be specialist in all of them but rather specialize.

First the amount of computation data available and labeled datasets gave birth to boom in supervised learning which till today has been one of the most used throughout industry and also in academics. However, for more complex problems more adaptable ways of learning have to be employed such as unsupervised learning and reinforcement learning. Reinforcement learning has many advantages over supervised learning. One of them being that we do not really need a labeled dataset in order to train a model. Unfortunately, desiging a good reward system and training a model is much more complicated. Every supervised learning problem can be turned into a reinforcment learning problem, and this is where mostly people start and later they would eventually go for reinforcement learning.

If you have already reached this page and decided to read those lines, then maybe you are interested to talk with me. Whether it is a simple classifier for image detection or something related to natural language processing. On my project page you can get idea of what I’ve worked on so far but here they are:

Ad-revenue: want to find out what is going on in the images or videos?

  • Image/video analysis
    • Video action detection
    • Image classification/regression - if you have the data I can make you a PoC!

Maybe you use video to know more about your candidates?

  • Eye-Gaze tracking
    • Where is the person focusing?
    • What knowledge can we extract from this behaviour (psychology)?

Need to make chatbot that does more than just answer simple questions?

  • Text semantic Analysis (NLP)
    • Google speech transcription API-s
    • Train state of the art transformer models for language modelling

Got a lot of data?

  • Automatic data labeling tools
    • A lot of data, but how to label it? I can help you!
    • Every company does something with data and labeling, probably you too!

Do not hesitate to contact me!
